/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/src/wavefrontd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/src/interceptor/phy_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/src/ambient_verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/src/calibration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/src/pll_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/mesh_legacy/mesh_discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/mesh_legacy/peer_routing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wavefrontd.dir/mesh_legacy/zk_verifier.cpp.o -o wavefrontd  -lpcap
